title: First-Party External-Validity Scaffolds
scope: source-only first-party provenance and planned full-product validation gates

entries.claim_boundary: Verifies pinned source commit, tree, and published source hashes only. Does not execute the real docs-forge Node installer and does not create runtime-drift claims.
entries.next_live_step: Build a safe adapter for partial docs-forge real-workload execution without publishing local source trees, secrets, or ignored dogfood artifacts.

entries.claim_boundary: Verifies pinned source commit, tree, and published source hashes only. Does not execute the full AuditLens product, connector auth flows, or live SaaS exports and does not create runtime-drift claims.
entries.next_live_step: Build a safe adapter for partial AuditLens generator or connector-mock execution using synthetic evidence and explicit no-real-credential guards.
